## 🛠️ 我的开源项目

### 🦅 Windhawk 模块 (Windhawk Mods)

<table width="100%">
  <tr>
    <td width="33.33%" valign="top">
      <b>桌面图标矩形选择</b><br>
      <sub>在桌面图标上使用类似 Excel 的二维矩形选择方式。</sub><br>
      <br>
      <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/总安装-308-0078D7?style=flat-square&logo=data%3Aimage/svg%2Bxml%3Bbase64%%2BPC9zdmc%2B"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/版本-v1.0-00B3D6?style=flat-square"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/日装-0-grey?style=flat-square"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/评分-%E2%80%8B%205.0_★-gold?style=flat-square"><br>
      <br>
      <a href="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JoeYe-233/images/main/desktop-rect-select-after.gif" target="_blank"><img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JoeYe-233/images/main/desktop-rect-select-after.gif" height="140" alt="桌面图标矩形选择"></a><br>
    </td>
    <td width="33.33%" valign="top">
      <b>增大任务管理器选项卡尺寸</b><br>
      <sub>Windows 10 任务管理器选项卡标签在高分屏上实在太小, 根本不好点击, 安装后会增大选项卡标签的高度.让其更易于使用.</sub><br>
      <br>
      <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/总安装-98-0078D7?style=flat-square&logo=data%3Aimage/svg%2Bxml%3Bbase64%%2BPC9zdmc%2B"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/版本-v1.0-00B3D6?style=flat-square"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/日装-0-grey?style=flat-square"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/评分-%E2%80%8B%205.0_★-gold?style=flat-square"><br>
      <br>
      <a href="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JoeYe-233/images/main/taskmgr-taller-tab-before-after.png" target="_blank"><img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JoeYe-233/images/main/taskmgr-taller-tab-before-after.png" height="140" alt="增大任务管理器选项卡尺寸"></a><br>
    </td>
    <td width="33.33%" valign="top">
      <b>Word 图像无损导出 PDF</b><br>
      <sub>强制 Word 导出 PDF 时使用 100% 无损图像质量</sub><br>
      <br>
      <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/总安装-86-0078D7?style=flat-square&logo=data%3Aimage/svg%2Bxml%3Bbase64%%2BPC9zdmc%2B"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/版本-v1.1.1-00B3D6?style=flat-square"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/日装-0-grey?style=flat-square"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/评分-%E2%80%8B%204.5_★-gold?style=flat-square"><br>
      <br>
      <a href="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JoeYe-233/images/main/word-pdf-lossless-export-after.png" target="_blank"><img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JoeYe-233/images/main/word-pdf-lossless-export-after.png" height="140" alt="Word 图像无损导出 PDF"></a><br>
    </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td valign="bottom">
      👉 <a href="https://windhawk.net/mods/desktop-rect-select" target="_blank">获 取</a>
    </td>
    <td valign="bottom">
      👉 <a href="https://windhawk.net/mods/taskmgr-taller-tab" target="_blank">获 取</a>
    </td>
    <td valign="bottom">
      👉 <a href="https://windhawk.net/mods/word-pdf-lossless-export" target="_blank">获 取</a>
    </td>
  </tr>
</table>

<table width="100%">
  <tr>
    <td width="33.33%" valign="top">
      <b>Visio 缩略图高清修复</b><br>
      <sub>修复资源管理器中 Visio 文档低质量缩略图问题</sub><br>
      <br>
      <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/总安装-52-0078D7?style=flat-square&logo=data%3Aimage/svg%2Bxml%3Bbase64%%2BPC9zdmc%2B"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/版本-v1.0.0-00B3D6?style=flat-square"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/日装-0-grey?style=flat-square"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/评分-%E2%80%8B%205.0_★-gold?style=flat-square"><br>
      <br>
      <a href="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JoeYe-233/images/main/visio-hd-thumbnail-after.png" target="_blank"><img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JoeYe-233/images/main/visio-hd-thumbnail-after.png" height="140" alt="Visio 缩略图高清修复"></a><br>
    </td>
    <td width="33.33%" valign="top">
      <b>Word MathType 公式深色模式修复</b><br>
      <sub>解决 Word 深色模式下 MathType 公式的可读性问题</sub><br>
      <br>
      <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/总安装-51-0078D7?style=flat-square&logo=data%3Aimage/svg%2Bxml%3Bbase64%%2BPC9zdmc%2B"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/版本-v1.0.1-00B3D6?style=flat-square"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/日装-0-grey?style=flat-square"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/评分-%E2%80%8B%205.0_★-gold?style=flat-square"><br>
      <br>
      <a href="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JoeYe-233/images/main/word-mathtype-dark-fix-before-original-after.png" target="_blank"><img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JoeYe-233/images/main/word-mathtype-dark-fix-before-original-after.png" height="140" alt="Word MathType 公式深色模式修复"></a><br>
    </td>
    <td width="33.33%" valign="top">
      <b>运行对话框自动关闭输入法</b><br>
      <sub>在资源管理器 Win+R 运行对话框输入时自动禁用输入法, 防止意外输入中文等非英文字符.</sub><br>
      <br>
      <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/总安装-48-0078D7?style=flat-square&logo=data%3Aimage/svg%2Bxml%3Bbase64%%2BPC9zdmc%2B"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/版本-v1.0-00B3D6?style=flat-square"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/日装-0-grey?style=flat-square"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/评分-%E2%80%8B%205.0_★-gold?style=flat-square"><br>
      <br>
      <br>
    </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td valign="bottom">
      👉 <a href="https://windhawk.net/mods/visio-hd-thumbnail" target="_blank">获 取</a>
    </td>
    <td valign="bottom">
      👉 <a href="https://windhawk.net/mods/word-mathtype-dark-fix" target="_blank">获 取</a>
    </td>
    <td valign="bottom">
      👉 <a href="https://windhawk.net/mods/run-box-no-ime" target="_blank">获 取</a>
    </td>
  </tr>
</table>

<table width="100%">
  <tr>
    <td width="33.33%" valign="top">
      <b>Office 还原旧版 UI 界面（32/64 位通用）</b><br>
      <sub>将 Office 2022+/365 的 UI 界面外观还原为 Office 2016/2019</sub><br>
      <br>
      <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/总安装-34-0078D7?style=flat-square&logo=data%3Aimage/svg%2Bxml%3Bbase64%%2BPC9zdmc%2B"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/版本-v1.0.1-00B3D6?style=flat-square"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/日装-0-grey?style=flat-square"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/评分-%E2%80%8B%205.0_★-gold?style=flat-square"><br>
      <br>
      <br>
    </td>
    <td width="33.33%" valign="top">
      <b>Visio 中键平移与智能缩放</b><br>
      <sub>为 Visio 带来现代化的导航体验：中键拖拽平移，滚轮直接缩放，完美兼容触摸板。</sub><br>
      <br>
      <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/总安装-20-0078D7?style=flat-square&logo=data%3Aimage/svg%2Bxml%3Bbase64%%2BPC9zdmc%2B"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/版本-v1.0-00B3D6?style=flat-square"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/日装-0-grey?style=flat-square"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/评分-%E2%80%8B%205.0_★-gold?style=flat-square"><br>
      <br>
      <br>
    </td>
    <td width="33.33%" valign="top">
      <b>Word 图片调整大小时防翻转</b><br>
      <sub>在 Microsoft Word 中调整图片大小时防止图片意外翻转</sub><br>
      <br>
      <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/总安装-18-0078D7?style=flat-square&logo=data%3Aimage/svg%2Bxml%3Bbase64%%2BPC9zdmc%2B"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/版本-v1.0.0-00B3D6?style=flat-square"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/日装-0-grey?style=flat-square"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/评分-%E2%80%8B%205.0_★-gold?style=flat-square"><br>
      <br>
      <a href="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JoeYe-233/images/main/word-image-resize-anti-flip-after.gif" target="_blank"><img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JoeYe-233/images/main/word-image-resize-anti-flip-after.gif" height="140" alt="Word 图片调整大小时防翻转"></a><br>
    </td>
  </tr>
  <tr>
    <td valign="bottom">
      👉 <a href="https://windhawk.net/mods/office-ui-reverter-universal" target="_blank">获 取</a>
    </td>
    <td valign="bottom">
      👉 <a href="https://windhawk.net/mods/visio-pan-zoom" target="_blank">获 取</a>
    </td>
    <td valign="bottom">
      👉 <a href="https://windhawk.net/mods/word-image-resize-anti-flip" target="_blank">获 取</a>
    </td>
  </tr>
</table>

  <tr>
    <td width="33.33%" valign="top">
      <b>任务管理器显示链路速度</b><br>

      <br>
      <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/总安装-9-0078D7?style=flat-square&logo=data%3Aimage/svg%2Bxml%3Bbase64%%2BPC9zdmc%2B"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/版本-v1.0.0-00B3D6?style=flat-square"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/日装-0-grey?style=flat-square"> <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/评分-%E2%80%8B%205.0_★-gold?style=flat-square"><br>

### 🐵 油猴脚本 (GreasyFork Scripts)

<p>暂无数据</p>
